ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Africa, Asia, Australia, Europe, Middle East) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region (e.g., AF for Africa) */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the region */,
  "region_energy_policy" TEXT /* Description of the region's energy policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the consumption data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the consumption data was recorded */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption value for the region in the given year */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year the consumption data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the consumption data was recorded */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government report, third-party research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which energy consumption data is available */,
  "year_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each year (e.g., Y2022 for 2022) */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumption type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the consumption type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each consumption type (e.g., EL for Electricity) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the consumption type (e.g., kWh, liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_consumption_types" (
  "region_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-consumption type record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the consumption type belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumption type */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Consumption value for the region and consumption type */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year the consumption data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month the consumption data was recorded */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_consumption_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES consumption_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_consumption_types_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each researcher (e.g., RJ123 for Alice Johnson) */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, co-author) */,
  "researcher_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the researcher (e.g., renewable energy, energy policy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the work */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "publication_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each publication (e.g., P001 for 'Energy Consumption Trends in Africa') */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each dataset (e.g., DS001 for 'Africa Energy Consumption Data') */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in megabytes (MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "dataset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "dataset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset type */,
  "dataset_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each dataset type (e.g., RD for Raw Data) */,
  "dataset_type_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset type (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_regions" (
  "dataset_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-region record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the dataset belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_regions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_years" (
  "dataset_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-year record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_years_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_years_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types_datasets" (
  "dataset_type_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-type record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_type_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_types_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_types_datasets_dataset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_type_id") REFERENCES dataset_types ("dataset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "data_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
